// 01 — CAPABILITIES

Everything you need.
In your pocket.

Plug into any network. Navigate the attack menu with the joystick. Results in your loot folder. No laptop required.

⚡
ARP & MITM ATTACKS
Kick hosts off the network, run bidirectional ARP MITM, cage targets, flood ARP tables, and DoS the gateway — all from the joystick.
📡
WIFI ENGINE
Monitor mode, airodump-ng scanning, deauth attacks, WPA handshake capture, PMKID attacks, evil twin AP, and WPS Pixie Dust.
🕵️
MITM & DNS SPOOF
DNS spoofing with 30+ phishing pages, DHCP spoof, SSL strip, HTTP sniffer, captive portal, rogue DHCP/WPAD, silent bridge.
🔑
RESPONDER / NTLMv2
One-button Responder launch with LLMNR/NBT-NS/MDNS poisoning. Hash capture displayed directly in the loot browser.
🛡️
PURPLE TEAM DEFENSE
ARP hardening, LLMNR detector, rogue device detection, baseline export and verification, SMB probe — all running passively on device.
🌐
LIVE WEBUI
10fps LCD mirror, virtual gamepad, payload IDE, loot browser, PTY shell, system monitor — all from any browser on the network.
👻
STEALTH MODE
Blank the LCD instantly. All attacks and services keep running in the background. Exit with KEY1+KEY3 held 3 seconds.
🎮
368 PAYLOADS
Reconnaissance, WiFi, Bluetooth, DoS, social engineering, interception, games, and more. Drop a .py file and it appears in the menu.
🔧
ONE-SHOT INSTALL
Single bash script on a fresh Kali ARM64 image. Fully unattended. Configures SPI, GPIO, systemd services, WiFi pinning, and reboots.

Full attack menu.

Every function accessible from the joystick. No SSH needed for field operations.

// 03 — KTOX SUITE

Full attack suite.
All modules included.

Every module installs to /root/KTOx/ and is accessible over SSH.

ktox.py
Full blood-red TUI — 35+ modules, ARP attacks, MITM, recon, host scanning, NDJSON session logging
ktox_mitm.py
DNS/DHCP spoof, HTTP sniffer, credential harvester, SSL strip, 5-template captive portal
ktox_advanced.py
JS/HTML injector, multi-protocol sniffer (FTP/SMTP/POP3/IMAP/Telnet/IRC/Redis/SNMP), PCAP export, NTLMv2 relay
ktox_extended.py
LLMNR/WPAD/NBT-NS poisoner, rogue SMB server, topology mapper, report generator, hashcat/john interface
ktox_defense.py
Purple team — ARP hardening, LLMNR disable, SMB signing, encrypted DNS, cleartext audit, dry-run preview
ktox_stealth.py
IoT fingerprinter (5-layer), Ghost/Ninja/Normal profiles, MAC rotation, rate limiting, traffic jitter
ktox_netattack.py
ICMP redirect (stealthy MITM), IPv6 NDP spoof, DHCPv6 spoof, IPv6 RA flood
ktox_wifi.py
Monitor mode, airodump-ng scanner, deauth, WPA handshake, PMKID, evil twin
ktox_dashboard.py
Live Flask web dashboard at :9999 — attack status, loot browser, real-time stats
ktox_repl.py
Interactive REPL — set/get session vars, module.start/stop, plugin system
root@ktox:~
# SSH access
root@ktox:~# python3 /root/KTOx/ktox.py
[ ok ] KTOx v1.0 — Network Control Suite
[ ok ] Interface: eth0 | IP: 192.168.1.47 | GW: 192.168.1.1
[ ok ] Loaded 13 modules | 368 payloads
 
root@ktox:~# python3 /root/KTOx/ktox_defense.py
[ ** ] Purple Team Mode — dry-run preview enabled
[ ok ] ARP table hardened — 14 static entries applied
[ ok ] LLMNR disabled via registry + systemd-resolved
[ ok ] SMB signing enforced

368 scripts.

Drop any .py file into a category folder and it appears in the menu automatically. WebUI virtual buttons work in every payload.

bluetooth/9

social_eng/5
Evil twin captive portals — Facebook · Google · PayPal · Router login · VPN login
general/36
MAC spoof · C2 controller · Bloodhound · pwnagotchi · process killer · file browser · fs encrypt/decrypt · webcam spy · self-destruct · auto-update · shell
games/13

exfiltration/ · remote_access/ · evil_portal/ · examples/5

// 05 — WEBUI

Control from
any browser.

Full remote control at http://[ip]:8080 — no app install needed.

📺

LIVE LCD MIRROR

10fps real-time screen stream via WebSocket. See exactly what's on the device.

🎮

VIRTUAL GAMEPAD

Full joystick + button control from any browser. No physical access needed.

🛠️

PAYLOAD IDE

Browse, edit, create, and launch payloads remotely with syntax highlighting.

📁

LOOT BROWSER

View, preview, and download all captured files. nmap XML visualizer included.

📊

SYSTEM MONITOR

CPU, RAM, temp, disk, uptime, and active payload status in real time.

💻

BROWSER SHELL

Full interactive PTY terminal in the browser via xterm.js. Root access.

🔔

DISCORD WEBHOOK

Configure loot exfiltration target directly from the WebUI settings panel.

🔐

AUTH SYSTEM

Username/password login with session tokens and first-run bootstrap flow.

KTOx_Pi INTERACTIVE TERMINAL — type 'help' to start
KTOx_Pi v1.0 — Network Control Suite
Type help for available commands.
 
root@ktox:~#
// 06 — INSTALL

Up and running
in minutes.

Fresh Kali ARM64 image → run install.sh → reboot → done.

01

FLASH KALI TO SD

Download the Kali Linux ARM64 image for Pi Zero 2W from kali.org/get-kali/#kali-arm and flash with Raspberry Pi Imager or Balena Etcher.

02

SSH IN

Connect ethernet, boot the Pi, then SSH in. Default credentials: root / kali — change these after install.

03

CLONE AND RUN

root@ktox:~
root@ktox:~# git clone https://github.com/wickednull/KTOx_Pi /tmp/KTOx_Pi
root@ktox:~# cd /tmp/KTOx_Pi && sudo bash install.sh
 
[ ok ] SPI enabled
[ ok ] GPIO pull-ups configured
[ ok ] 368 payloads installed → /root/KTOx/payloads/
[ ok ] 3 services enabled: ktox · ktox-device · ktox-webui
[ ok ] WebUI token generated
[ ** ] Rebooting in 5s...
04

BOOT & GO

On next boot the KTOx demon skull logo appears, then the main menu. WebUI is live at http://[ip]:8080 immediately.

// COMPATIBLE HARDWARE
BOARDSTATUSNOTES
Pi Zero 2W / 2WH ⭐✓ FullBuilt and tested on this. Perfect field size.
Pi 3B / 3B+✓ FullSame Kali ARM64 image, same 40-pin header.
Pi 4B✓ FullMore power than needed but fully compatible.
Pi Zero W (v1)⚠ Partial32-bit only — use Kali ARMhf image.
Pi 5⚠ TweakSwap RPi.GPIO for lgpio (different GPIO chip).
Pi Pico / Pico W✗ NoMicrocontroller, not Linux.
